Az ORION tartozék megkönnyíti a forrólevegős fritőz tisztítását és rendszeres karbantartását, és hagyományos sütőben is használható sült krumpli, csirkeszárnyak, csíkok, sült tészták, zöldségek és egyéb diétás ételek készítésekor. A forma szilikonból készült, és -20 °C és +230 °C közötti hőmérsékletre tervezték. A forma átmérője 23 cm, az alja átmérője 19 cm, a forma magassága 6 cm, a fogantyúkkal együtt 8 cm. Alkalmas mosogatógépbe, mikrohullámú sütőbe, hagyományos sütőbe és fagyasztóba. Nem veszi át az étel szagát vagy ízét. items.raw_desc: Szelén GreenFood Nutrition Selenium Lalmin® 90 kapszula:GreenFood Nutrition Selenium Lalmin®90 + 20 capsulesThe yeast Saccharomyces cerevisiae, known for its nutritional properties, is used to produce Selen Lalmin®. The yeast is grown under controlled conditions on a nutrient medium rich in sugars, minerals and other nutrients. During cultivation, selenium in the form of sodium selenite is added to the culture medium. The yeast absorbs this selenium and incorporates it into its cellular structure. This process is called "biofortification". The yeast continues to grow and ferment, during which it is further enriched with selenium. Fermentation takes place under controlled temperatures and other conditions that promote optimal growth and enrichment. Once the fermentation process is complete, the yeast is harvested, which involves separating the yeast from the culture medium. items.raw_desc: Ülésvédő Iso Trade Autósülés védő alátét:        If you're travelling with your kids, keeping a clean car can be quite a challenge. This car seat protection pad guarantees protection of the upholstery and makes general cleaning easier. It is made of durable polyester that is easy to clean because dirt cannot penetrate the fibres of the material. It has a padded cushion made of thick waterproof polyester. The pad is easy to assemble - just place it on the seat and use the plastic straps added to the top of the pad to attach it to the headrest. There are two pockets at the bottom of the mat where your children can keep all their essentials. The pockets are made of perforated material, so you can quickly check their interior. Iron is one of the indispensable trace elements in the body. Even though we have relatively little of it, it is very important for the body. Iron contributes to the normal transport of oxygen in the body and accounts for two-thirds of the total amount of iron in the blood. Most of the iron in the human body occurs in the form of haemoglobin. It is part of the red blood cells and ensures the transport of oxygen throughout the body. As a form of use we have chosen vegetable capsules made of cellulose. These are also ideal for vegans and vegetarians and also guarantee fast and effective absorption of both micronutrients.
